target: Liz AI Teacher - Renamed from Emily, with Voice Interaction (STT/TTS) and Progress Awareness
summary: All Liz AI Teacher features working correctly. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed - Chat API, Multi-turn conversations with session context, Sessions listing, Chat History, TTS (JSON body), STT (file upload), New Session endpoints all functional. Frontend: Liz page loads with correct branding (Liz, not Emily). Welcome screen shows with 4 quick prompts (Analyze my progress, Build a study plan, Give me a vocabulary lesson, Let's practice grammar). Microphone button visible, Send button works, Session History dropdown works with New Conversation option. Liz floating button visible on dashboard and correctly hidden on /liz page. Liz is progress-aware - references user's plan (free), study streak (1-day), and recommends taking a practice test.

features_tested.notes: Returns {success: true, session_id, response} - GPT-4o responds with IELTS-specific content
Second message with same session_id remembers context from first message
Returns list of previous sessions with preview text
Returns messages array with role, content, and timestamp for each message
Returns {audio: base64, format: mp3} - OpenAI TTS with nova voice
Returns {success: true, text: 'transcription'} - Uses whisper-1 model
Creates new session and returns session_id
Shows 'Hi, I'm Liz' heading, 'Your IELTS Teacher & Coach' subtitle, 4 quick prompt buttons

features_tested.test_method: Playwright - clicked quick prompt, typed message, verified responses
features_tested.notes: Clicking 'Analyze my progress' sends message, Liz responds with progress-aware analysis mentioning free plan and study streak
Button appears in bottom-right corner with graduation cap icon, navigates to /liz, correctly hidden on /liz page
Shows 'New Conversation' option and list of previous sessions with previews
Microphone button visible in input area for voice recording
No 'Emily' references in LizTeacher.js, LizFloatingButton.js, or App.js routes. Old Emily files exist but are not imported/used

critical_code_review_comments: Old Emily files (EmilyTeacher.js, EmilyFloatingButton.js) still exist in codebase but are not imported - consider removing for cleanup
Old Emily backend routes at /api/emily/* return 404 - consider removing emily_teacher.py from routes if it exists
seed_data_creation: Created multiple Liz chat sessions during testing - stored in MongoDB liz_sessions collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Liz AI Teacher feature fully implemented and tested (renamed from Emily). Uses GPT-4o via emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. TTS uses OpenAI TTS with nova voice. STT uses whisper-1 model. Chat messages stored in MongoDB liz_sessions collection. LizFloatingButton conditionally renders on all pages except /liz (controlled in App.js line 450). All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing. Liz is progress-aware and retrieves user data from MongoDB collections (users, user_completions, liz_sessions, etc.) to provide personalized IELTS coaching.
